name: Hotel Roanoke Peanut Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan and add onion and celery.
2. Saute for 5 minutes until onions are translucent but not browned.
3. Add flour, stirring to combine.
4. Stir in the chicken broth and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and strain through a fine-mesh sieve.
6. Return strained soup to pot and stir in peanut butter, celery salt, additional salt, and lemon juice.
7. Serve hot, sprinkling ground peanuts on top before serving.
Makes 20 1/2 cups servings.
